properties.name: com.orderprocessing.ship.page-size
properties.description: Default page size for listing fulfillments and shipments

properties.name: com.orderprocessing.ship.max-page-size
properties.description: Maximum page size for request (will not overwrite system hard limit of 10_000)

properties.name: com.orderprocessing.ship.shipment-sorting-attribute
properties.description: Default shipments sorting attribute and optional sorting order (e.g. shipped,desc)

properties.name: com.orderprocessing.ship.fulfillment-sorting-attribute
properties.description: Default fulfillments sorting attribute and optional sorting order (e.g. created,desc)
